summarization.a: The process flow diagram illustrates the sequential steps involved in a simulation process using a macroscopic CFD model and a microscopic kMC model.

a.question: What type of data is extracted from the CFD model?
a.answer: a	information regarding the partial pressure of precursor on the substrate as well as the temperature there.

a.question: What does the kMC model specifically calculate?
a.answer: a	This part of the total model calculates the surface kinetics that will be fed back into the CFD model.

a.question: How long will the model run?
a.answer: a	This will be based on a certain inpur parameter that will be reached by t + delta t.

a.question: Can the model be described with a feedback loop?
